  "claims": [

    {"id": "cl-lmf-meps-agreement", "claim_text": "For participants in both NHIS and MEPS, results showed almost perfect agreement between the two data sources, supporting the accuracy of the mortality linkage methodology.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "the results showed almost perfect agreement between", "location": "Case Study 1 — Accuracy and Reliability, p. 11"},

    {"id": "cl-lmf-free-political-influence", "claim_text": "The production of the 2019 Linked Mortality Files was free from political influence.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The production of the 2019 LMFs was free from political influence.", "location": "Case Study 1 — Scientific Integrity, p. 12"},
    {"id": "cl-corp5-accuracy", "claim_text": "The CORP5 research process did not find differences greater than 1.0% at the U.S. level over 3.5 years compared to the CPI for gasoline.", "claim_type": "empirical", "grounding_span": "The CORP5 research process did not find differences greater than 1.0% at the U.S. level", "location": "Case Study 2 — Accuracy and Reliability, p. 16"},
